overview.description: Berkshire Hathaway Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the insurance, freight rail transportation, and utility businesses. The company provides property, casualty, life, accident, and health insurance and reinsurance; operates railroad systems in North America; generates, transmits, stores, and distributes electricity from natural gas, coal, wind, solar, hydroelectric, nuclear, and geothermal sources; operates natural gas distribution and storage facilities, interstate pipelines, liquefied natural gas facilities, and compressor and...
overview.financialIntro: In 2025, Berkshire Hathaway's revenue was $371.44 billion, an increase of 0.00% compared to the previous year's $371.43 billion. Earnings were $66.97 billion, a decrease of -24.75%.
overview.analystIntro: According to 4 analysts, the average rating for BRK.B stock is "Buy." The 12-month stock price target is $520.33, which is an increase of 5.91% from the latest price.
